plugin.name: ThreeS_Stepper
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.description:
Area stepper. Loads paths/mobs from 3s_areas.lua (same folder as this plugin).
Commands (same as TinTin++): - <area> or walker <area> start botting an area (e.g. "- aegis") .. resume stepping .stop stop and save position .pause pause (keep position) .resume resume from saved position .dcr resume after a disconnect .stack <n> stack up to n mobs on next move killbot kill the bot completely v on|off vacuum (auto-loot rooms) on/off pa <name> add party member (won't count as 'player found') pr <name> remove party member .set <opt> on|off options: autokill autoresume hardmode stackit bagit necbagit bardit .areas list known areas .binfo this help

trigger.name: bot_wall
trigger.match: ^You are unable to penetrate the wall that

alias.send: bot.stacknum = %1; Note("Stacking up to %1 mobs on next move")
dm_on = ("%1" == "on") SetVariable("dm_on", dm_on and "1" or "0") Note("[deadman] %1") dm_draw()
dm_secs = math.max(60, math.min(7200, %1)) SetVariable("dm_secs", tostring(dm_secs)) Note("[deadman] " .. dm_secs .. "s") dm_draw()

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
-- ====================== state ====================== areas = {}
bot = { active = false, -- a stepper is loaded and running area = nil, cfg = nil, path = {}, pos = 1, armed = false, -- next prompt -> loot + walk mob_pending = nil, -- mob seen this room, engage on next prompt paused_on_mob = false, foundmob = false, -- saw a mob this lap (controls looping) lastdir = nil, vacuum = true, stacknum = 0, no_loop = false, no_home = false, hardmode = false, opts = { autokill = false, autoresume = true, stackit = false, bagit = false, necbagit = false, bardit = false }, } bot_flags = { player = false, item = false, gold = false, corpse = false }
party = {} local last_input = os.time() local CHAOS_ID = "5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d" local dm_on = (GetVariable("dm_on") ~= "0") local dm_secs = tonumber(GetVariable("dm_secs")) or 600 local dm_visible = (GetVariable("dm_visible") ~= "0") local dm_info local rec = nil -- active path recording: { name=, path={}, mobs={}, kill= }
local REV = { n="s", s="n", e="w", w="e", ne="sw", sw="ne", nw="se", se="nw", u="d", d="u", north="south", south="north", east="west", west="east", northeast="sw", southwest="ne", northwest="se", southeast="nw", up="down", down="up" }
local function note(s) ColourNote("yellow", "", "[bot] " .. s) end local function dnote(s) ColourNote("silver", "", "[bot] " .. s) end
local function save_position() SetVariable("bot_active", bot.active and "1" or "0") SetVariable("save_area", bot.area or "") SetVariable("save_pos", tostring(bot.pos)) SetVariable("autokill", bot.opts.autokill and "1" or "0") end
local function reset_room_flags() bot_flags.player = false; bot_flags.item = false bot_flags.gold = false; bot_flags.corpse = false end
-- ====================== area data ====================== local function load_areas() local dir = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) local ok, err = pcall(dofile, dir .. "3s_areas.lua") if not ok then ColourNote("red", "", "[bot] could not load 3s_areas.lua: " .. tostring(err)) else local n = 0 for _ in pairs(areas) do n = n + 1 end note(n .. " areas loaded (.areas to list, .binfo for help)") end end
-- ====================== looting ====================== local function loot_room() if bot_flags.item and not bot_flags.player and bot.vacuum then if bot.opts.stackit then Execute("stackall") elseif bot.opts.bagit then Execute("_bagall") elseif bot.opts.necbagit then Send("!qtrance gather") elseif bot.opts.bardit then Send("!get all") Send("!put all in disc") Send("!drop all") else Send("!get all") end end if bot_flags.corpse and not bot_flags.player then Send("!get corpse") end if bot_flags.gold and not bot_flags.player then Send("!get coins") end end
-- ====================== walking ====================== local function end_of_path() if bot.no_loop or not bot.foundmob then note("end of path - stopping" .. (bot.no_home and "" or ", heading home")) bot_kill() if not bot.no_home then Send("go home") end else bot.pos = 1 bot.foundmob = false bot_step() end end
function bot_step() if not bot.active then return end if bot.pos > #bot.path then end_of_path() return end local dir = bot.path[bot.pos] bot.lastdir = dir bot.pos = bot.pos + 1 Send(dir) ab_draw() end
function bot_path_undo() if rec then if #rec.path > 0 then local dropped = table.remove(rec.path) note("recording: move failed - dropped '" .. dropped .. "'") ab_draw() end return end if not bot.active then return end bot.pos = math.max(1, bot.pos - 1) note("could not move - path position now " .. bot.pos .. "/" .. #bot.path) end
-- ====================== event handlers ====================== function bot_on_room(roominfo) if not bot.active then return end if bot.paused_on_mob then if not bot.wimpy_warned then bot.wimpy_warned = true note("WIMPY! Moved during the fight - bot stopped, position saved.") note("Walk back to where you fought, then '.resume' to continue.") Sound("SysExclamation") bot_stop() end return end bot.wimpy_warned = false reset_room_flags() bot.mob_pending = nil bot.armed = true end
function bot_on_item(line) if not bot.active then return end bot_flags.item = true if line:match("^=I=.*preserved.*corpse of.*%.$") then bot_flags.corpse = true end end
function bot_on_player(name) if not bot.active then return end for _, member in ipairs(party) do if name:find(member, 1, true) then return end end bot_flags.player = true end
function bot_on_mob(name) if rec then local clean = name:gsub("%s*%b{}", ""):gsub("%s*%b[]", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if #clean > 0 and not rec.mobs[clean] then rec.mobs[clean] = true note("recording: mob noted - " .. clean) end return end if not bot.active or bot.paused_on_mob or not bot.cfg then return end local entry = bot.cfg.mobs and bot.cfg.mobs[name] if not entry and bot.cfg.mobs then -- live lines often carry tags: 'A cave troll {angry} [scratched].' for k, v in pairs(bot.cfg.mobs) do if name:sub(1, #k) == k then entry = v break end end end local kill if entry then if entry.hard and not bot.hardmode then return end kill = entry.kill elseif bot.cfg.default_mob then kill = bot.cfg.default_mob end if kill then bot.mob_pending = kill end end
function bot_on_prompt() if not bot.active then return end if bot.mob_pending then local mob = bot.mob_pending bot.mob_pending = nil if bot_flags.player then note("Found player. skipping!") bot_step() return end -- engage bot.armed = false bot.paused_on_mob = true bot.foundmob = true save_position() local rev = REV[bot.lastdir or ""] if rev then Send("ra " .. rev) end bot.current_mob = mob Send("kill " .. mob) loot_room() if bot.stacknum > 0 then bot.stacknum = bot.stacknum - 1 note("Stacking " .. bot.stacknum .. " more.") bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.armed = true bot_step() end ab_draw() return end if bot.armed then bot.armed = false loot_room() bot_step() end end
function bot_on_killblow() if bot.active and bot.opts.autokill then DoAfterSpecial(1.5, 'Send("ki")', sendto.script) end end
function bot_no_mob_here(name) if bot.active and bot.paused_on_mob and bot.opts.autoresume and name == bot.current_mob then DoAfterSpecial(1, "bot_resume_step()", sendto.script) end end
-- ====================== commands ====================== function bot_start(area) if not areas[area] then note("unknown area '" .. area .. "' (.areas to list)") return end local cfg = areas[area] bot.area = area; bot.cfg = cfg bot.path = cfg.path; bot.pos = 1 bot.no_loop = (cfg.no_loop == 1) bot.no_home = (cfg.no_home == 1) bot.hardmode = (cfg.hardmode == 1) bot.vacuum = (cfg.vacuum ~= 0) bot.foundmob = false bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.active = true reset_room_flags() save_position() note("botting '" .. area .. "' - " .. #bot.path .. " steps. '..' to step, .stop to stop.") bot_resume_step() ab_draw() end
function bot_resume_step() if not bot.active then note("bot is not active") return end bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.mob_pending = nil bot.armed = false Send("!glance") ab_draw() end
function bot_pause() if not bot.active then note("Bot is not active") return end bot.paused_on_mob = true bot.armed = false note("paused at " .. (bot.pos) .. "/" .. #bot.path) ab_draw() end
function bot_stop() if not bot.active then note("Bot is not active") return end save_position() bot.paused_on_mob = true bot.armed = false note("stopped. position " .. bot.pos .. "/" .. #bot.path .. " saved (.resume / .dcr to continue)") ab_draw() end
function bot_resume_saved() local area = GetVariable("save_area") or "" local pos = tonumber(GetVariable("save_pos") or "") or 1 if area == "" or not areas[area] then note("nothing to resume") return end bot_start_quiet(area, pos) end
function bot_start_quiet(area, pos) bot_start(area) bot.pos = math.min(pos, #bot.path) note("resumed '" .. area .. "' at step " .. bot.pos) end
function bot_kill() bot.active = false bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.armed = false bot.mob_pending = nil save_position() note("bot killed") ab_draw() end
function bot_set(opt, val) if bot.opts[opt] == nil and opt ~= "hardmode" then note("unknown option '" .. opt .. "'") return end if opt == "hardmode" then bot.hardmode = (val == "on") else bot.opts[opt] = (val == "on") end save_position() note(opt .. ": " .. val) ab_draw() end
-- auto-capture the party list from the in-game party table local pcap = nil
function party_capture_start() pcap = {} end
function party_capture_member(name) if pcap and name ~= "Name" then pcap[#pcap + 1] = name end end
function party_capture_end() if not pcap then return end if #pcap > 0 then party = pcap SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party captured: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end pcap = nil end
function bot_party_add(name) party[#party + 1] = name SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end
function bot_party_remove(name) for i, m in ipairs(party) do if m == name then table.remove(party, i) break end end SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end
function bot_list_areas() local t = {} for k in pairs(areas) do t[#t + 1] = k end table.sort(t) note("areas: " .. table.concat(t, ", ")) end
function bot_help() Note([[ 3S Stepper commands: - <area> / walker <area> start botting (see .areas) .. step/resume .stop stop+save .pause pause .resume / .dcr resume from saved position .stack <n> stack mobs v on|off vacuum looting pa/pr <name> party add/remove (skip-protection) .set <opt> on|off autokill autoresume hardmode stackit bagit necbagit bardit ]]) end
-- ====================== path recorder ====================== local REC_MOVES = { n=1, s=1, e=1, w=1, u=1, d=1, ne=1, nw=1, se=1, sw=1, north=1, south=1, east=1, west=1, up=1, down=1, northeast=1, northwest=1, southeast=1, southwest=1, out=1, enter=1, leave=1, }
function rec_start(name) name = name:lower() if name == "status" then rec_status() return end if rec then note("already recording '" .. rec.name .. "' - 'record save' or 'record cancel' first") return end if bot.active then bot_kill() end rec = { name = name, path = {}, mobs = {}, kill = nil } note("RECORDING area '" .. name .. "'. Walk the route; moves are captured.") note("Special steps: 'r: open door' Set kill word: 'record kill troll'") note("'record undo' drops the last step, 'record save' writes it, 'record cancel' discards.") ab_draw() end
function rec_special(cmd) if not rec then note("not recording - 'record <name>' first") Send(cmd) return end rec.path[#rec.path + 1] = cmd Send(cmd) note("recording: step " .. #rec.path .. " = '" .. cmd .. "'") ab_draw() end
function rec_undo() if not rec then note("not recording") return end if #rec.path == 0 then note("recording: nothing to undo") return end local dropped = table.remove(rec.path) note("recording: dropped '" .. dropped .. "' (" .. #rec.path .. " steps left)") ab_draw() end
function rec_setkill(word) if not rec then note("not recording") return end rec.kill = word note("recording: kill word = " .. word) end
function rec_status() if not rec then note("not recording. 'record <name>' starts; the route + mobs are captured as you walk.") return end local nm = 0 for _ in pairs(rec.mobs) do nm = nm + 1 end note(string.format("recording '%s': %d steps, %d mob types, kill word: %s", rec.name, #rec.path, nm, rec.kill or "(not set - 'record kill <word>')")) if #rec.path > 0 then note("route so far: " .. table.concat(rec.path, " ")) end end
function rec_cancel() if not rec then note("not recording") return end note("recording '" .. rec.name .. "' discarded") rec = nil ab_draw() end
function rec_save() if not rec then note("not recording") return end if #rec.path == 0 then note("recording: no steps - walk the route first (or 'record cancel')") return end local kill = rec.kill or "CHANGEME" -- build the lua block local function q(s) return '"' .. s:gsub('\\', '\\\\'):gsub('"', '\\"') .. '"' end local b = {} b[#b + 1] = " " .. rec.name .. " = {" local steps = {} for _, s in ipairs(rec.path) do steps[#steps + 1] = q(s) end b[#b + 1] = " path = { " .. table.concat(steps, ", ") .. " }," b[#b + 1] = " no_loop = 0, no_home = 1, hardmode = 0, vacuum = 1," local mobnames = {} for m in pairs(rec.mobs) do mobnames[#mobnames + 1] = m end table.sort(mobnames) if #mobnames > 0 then b[#b + 1] = " mobs = {" for _, m in ipairs(mobnames) do b[#b + 1] = " [" .. q(m) .. "] = { kill = " .. q(kill) .. " }," end b[#b + 1] = " }," end b[#b + 1] = " }," local block = table.concat(b, "\n") .. "\n" -- append into 3s_areas.lua (before the closing brace) local fn = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "3s_areas.lua" local f = io.open(fn, "r") if not f then note("ERROR: cannot open " .. fn) return end local content = f:read("*a") f:close() local body = content:match("^(.*)}%s*$") if not body then note("ERROR: unexpected 3s_areas.lua format - not saved") return end f = io.open(fn, "w") if not f then note("ERROR: cannot write " .. fn) return end f:write(body .. block .. "}\n") f:close() -- hot-load so it's usable right away local newarea = { path = {}, no_loop = 0, no_home = 1, hardmode = 0, vacuum = 1, mobs = {} } for _, s in ipairs(rec.path) do newarea.path[#newarea.path + 1] = s end for _, m in ipairs(mobnames) do newarea.mobs[m] = { kill = kill } end if areas[rec.name] then note("note: '" .. rec.name .. "' existed - the new recording takes over") end areas[rec.name] = newarea note("saved '" .. rec.name .. "': " .. #rec.path .. " steps, " .. #mobnames .. " mob types -> 3s_areas.lua") if kill == "CHANGEME" then note("WARNING: no kill word was set - edit 3s_areas.lua and replace CHANGEME (or re-record)") end rec = nil ab_draw() end
-- ====================== bots window (tabbed: Area | Chaos | Deadman) ====================== local ABWIN = "areabot_" .. GetPluginID() local ABW = 300 local ab_info local ab_visible = (GetVariable("ab_visible") ~= "0") local ab_tab = GetVariable("ab_tab") or "Area"
local function ab_btn(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or 0x402818) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "ab_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
-- called by the chaos plugin when its tab bar hands over to us function ab_show_at(x, y, tabname) if not ab_info then ab_info = movewindow.install(ABWIN, 5, 0) end x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) if x and y then ab_info.window_left, ab_info.window_top = x, y end if tabname and tabname ~= "" then ab_tab = tabname end ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_draw() end
function dm_button(flags, id) if id == "dm_power" then dm_on = not dm_on elseif id == "dm_minus" then dm_secs = math.max(60, dm_secs - 60) elseif id == "dm_plus" then dm_secs = math.min(7200, dm_secs + 60) end SetVariable("dm_on", dm_on and "1" or "0") SetVariable("dm_secs", tostring(dm_secs)) ab_draw() end
function ab_button(flags, id) if id == "ab_walk" then bot_resume_step() elseif id == "ab_pause" then bot_pause() elseif id == "ab_stop" then bot_stop() elseif id == "ab_res" then bot_resume_saved() elseif id == "ab_kill" then bot_kill() elseif id == "ab_autok" then bot_set("autokill", bot.opts.autokill and "off" or "on") elseif id == "ab_autor" then bot_set("autoresume", bot.opts.autoresume and "off" or "on") elseif id == "ab_hard" then bot_set("hardmode", bot.hardmode and "off" or "on") elseif id == "ab_loot" then bot.vacuum = not bot.vacuum note("vacuum: " .. (bot.vacuum and "on" or "off")) elseif id == "ab_hide" then ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) return elseif id == "tab_Area" or id == "tab_Deadman" then ab_tab = id:sub(5) SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) elseif id == "tab_Chaos" then -- hand the window position over to the chaos plugin local x = ab_info and ab_info.window_left or 0 local y = ab_info and ab_info.window_top or 0 ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) local rc = CallPlugin(CHAOS_ID, "cs_show_at", tostring(x), tostring(y)) if rc ~= 0 then note("chaos sea plugin not available") ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") ab_draw() end return elseif id:match("^area_") then bot_start(id:sub(6)) return end ab_draw() end
local function ab_tabs_row() local tw = math.floor((ABW - 2) / 3) for i, t in ipairs({ "Area", "Chaos", "Deadman" }) do local x1 = 1 + (i - 1) * tw local sel = (t == ab_tab) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, sel and 0x604020 or 0x301E12) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, sel and "fb" or "f", t, x1 + math.floor(tw / 2) - #t * 4, 22, 0, 0, sel and 0x40C0FF or 0xD0D0D0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, "tab_" .. t, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, "", "", "ab_button", "", "", t, 1, 0) end end
local function ab_draw_area() local txt2, col2 if rec then local nm = 0 for _ in pairs(rec.mobs) do nm = nm + 1 end txt2, col2 = string.format("RECORDING %s: %d steps, %d mobs", rec.name, #rec.path, nm), 0x40C0FF elseif not bot.active then txt2, col2 = "no area loaded - click one below", 0x808080 elseif bot.paused_on_mob then txt2, col2 = "FIGHTING / PAUSED - Walk resumes", 0x5050F0 else txt2, col2 = "WALKING " .. (bot.area or "?"), 0x60E060 end WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", txt2, 8, 40, 0, 0, col2) local total = #bot.path local done = math.max(0, bot.pos - 1) WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("step %d / %d", done, total), 8, 55, 0, 0, 0x909090) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 100, 57, 292, 67, 0x2A1C14) if total > 0 then local fill = math.floor(190 * math.min(done / total, 1)) if fill > 0 then WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 101, 58, 101 + fill, 66, 0x40A040) end end WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, 100, 57, 292, 67, 0x604020) ab_btn("ab_walk", 8, 73, 62, 93, "Walk", false, "Step / resume ('..')") ab_btn("ab_pause", 66, 73, 124, 93, "Pause", false, "Pause, keep position") ab_btn("ab_stop", 128, 73, 182, 93, "Stop", false, "Stop and save position") ab_btn("ab_res", 186, 73, 248, 93, "Resume", false, "Resume from saved position (.dcr)") ab_btn("ab_kill", 252, 73, 292, 93, "Kill", false, "Kill the bot completely") ab_btn("ab_autok", 8, 97, 70, 117, "AutoK", bot.opts.autokill, "'ki' after every killing blow") ab_btn("ab_autor", 74, 97, 136, 117, "AutoR", bot.opts.autoresume, "Auto-walk on 'There is no X here.'") ab_btn("ab_hard", 140, 97, 196, 117, "Hard", bot.hardmode, "Engage 'hard' mobs too") ab_btn("ab_loot", 200, 97, 250, 117, "Loot", bot.vacuum, "Auto-loot rooms") ab_btn("ab_hide", 256, 97, 292, 117, "X", false, "Hide ('areabot' brings it back)") WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", "Areas (click to start)", 8, 123, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) local names = {} for k in pairs(areas) do names[#names + 1] = k end table.sort(names) local rows = math.ceil(#names / 2) for i, name in ipairs(names) do local col = (i <= rows) and 0 or 1 local row = (col == 0) and i or (i - rows) local x = 8 + col * 146 local y = 125 + row * 14 local active = (bot.active and bot.area == name) WindowText(ABWIN, "f", name, x, y, 0, 0, active and 0x60FF60 or 0x40C0C0) local a = areas[name] local nm = 0 if a.mobs then for _ in pairs(a.mobs) do nm = nm + 1 end end WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, "area_" .. name, x, y, x + 140, y + 13, "", "", "ab_button", "", "", name .. ": " .. #a.path .. " steps, " .. nm .. " mob types - click to start", 1, 0) end end
local function ab_draw_deadman() local idle = os.time() - last_input local running = bot.active or (GetPluginVariable(CHAOS_ID, "auto") == "1") local line1, col1 if not dm_on then line1, col1 = "OFF - bots never auto-stop", 0x808080 else line1, col1 = string.format("stops bots after %dm idle", math.floor(dm_secs / 60)), 0x60E060 end WindowText(ABWIN, "f", line1, 8, 42, 0, 0, col1) local idlecol = 0x909090 if dm_on and running and idle > dm_secs * 0.8 then idlecol = 0x5050F0 end WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("idle %dm %02ds %s", math.floor(idle / 60), idle % 60, running and "bot RUNNING" or "no bot active"), 8, 56, 0, 0, idlecol) dm_btn_in_ab("dm_power", 8, 74, 64, 94, dm_on and "ON" or "OFF", dm_on, "Stop all bots when idle too long") dm_btn_in_ab("dm_minus", 70, 74, 94, 94, "-", false, "One minute less") WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("%dm", math.floor(dm_secs / 60)), 100, 77, 0, 0, 0xF0F0F0) dm_btn_in_ab("dm_plus", 134, 74, 158, 94, "+", false, "One minute more") ab_btn("ab_hide", 256, 74, 292, 94, "X", false, "Hide ('deadman' brings it back)") end
function dm_btn_in_ab(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or 0x402818) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "dm_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
function ab_draw() if not ab_visible then return end if not ab_info then ab_info = movewindow.install(ABWIN, 5, 0) end local ABH = (ab_tab == "Deadman") and 104 or 306 WindowCreate(ABWIN, ab_info.window_left, ab_info.window_top, ABW, ABH, ab_info.window_mode, ab_info.window_flags, 0x101418) WindowFont(ABWIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(ABWIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, 0, 0, ABW, ABH, 0x604020) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 1, 1, ABW - 1, 17, 0x402818) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", "Bots", 8, 3, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) movewindow.add_drag_handler(ABWIN, 0, 0, ABW, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand) ab_tabs_row() if ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_draw_deadman() else ab_draw_area() end WindowShow(ABWIN, true) end
function ab_toggle_window() ab_visible = not ab_visible SetVariable("ab_visible", ab_visible and "1" or "0") if ab_visible then ab_tab = "Area" SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_draw() else WindowShow(ABWIN, false) end end
function dm_toggle_window() if ab_visible and ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) else ab_tab = "Deadman" SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") ab_draw() end end
function dm_draw() if ab_visible and ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_draw() end end
-- ====================== idle deadman switch ====================== function OnPluginCommand(text) last_input = os.time() if rec then for token in text:gmatch("[^;]+") do local t = token:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", ""):lower() if REC_MOVES[t] then rec.path[#rec.path + 1] = t note("recording: step " .. #rec.path .. " = " .. t) ab_draw() end end end return true end
function bot_idle_check() local idle = os.time() - last_input if dm_on and idle > dm_secs then local fired = false if bot.active and not bot.paused_on_mob then bot_stop() fired = true end if GetPluginVariable(CHAOS_ID, "auto") == "1" then Execute("cs auto off") fired = true end if fired then note("DEADMAN: " .. math.floor(dm_secs / 60) .. "m without input - bots stopped") Sound("SysExclamation") end end dm_draw() end
AddTimer("bot_idle", 0, 0, 5, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.Replace, "bot_idle_check")
-- ====================== init ====================== function OnPluginSaveState() if ab_info then movewindow.save_state(ABWIN) end end
function OnPluginInstall() load_areas() ab_draw() local p = GetVariable("party") if p and p ~= "" then for m in p:gmatch("[^\n]+") do party[#party + 1] = m end end bot.opts.autokill = (GetVariable("autokill") == "1") end
